name: Bill Summers
abstract: Bill Summers (born June 27, 1948) is an American Afro-Cuban jazz/Latin jazz percussionist, a multi-instrumentalist who plays primarily on conga drums.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Donald Byrd and The Blackbyrds, and Herbie Hancock Septet

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: Eventually, with the Los Hombres Calientes band that I was in, and the Casa Samba group, which – I was in those at the same time. ... working with Bill Summers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Julius Handy
about_quotes.evidence: I got to give it to Bill Summers, and he was the greatest himself.
